npcs.name: Dr. Biologist
dialogue: You're awake, Zac. Stay calm. This is the Quarantine Woods research zone.
A failed experiment released unstable mutation energy through the forest. Most creatures here are no longer natural.
Your body is different because the old stabilizer trial left adaptive markers in your cells. The outbreak mutates you, but it does not break you.
You can stabilize samples and turn them into controlled abilities. That makes you our best chance, but also our biggest risk if you evolve too fast.
Mira is our field healer and support specialist. Kael is the team's frontline defender who can weaken larger mutants.
Talk to both of them, visit Quartermaster Rhea, collect samples, and unlock two mutations before you challenge the Mutant Bear.

npcs.name: Mira
dialogue: Mira: I'm the field healer attached to this containment team.
In battle I can use First Aid to patch up wounded allies and flush poison before it spreads.
Your mutations are useful, Zac, but they stress your body. If your HP drops too low, let me stabilize you instead of gambling on one more attack.
Use Med Kits before the fight gets out of control, and save Revive Shots for when an ally has already fallen.
The forest is adapting. If we keep the team alive, we can push deeper without feeding the outbreak more victims.

npcs.name: Kael
dialogue: Kael: I used to guard the lab perimeter before containment failed.
Now I take the front line. In battle I can use Shield Bash to lower a mutant's attack or Protective Guard to brace myself.
The Bear is not just hunting. It is holding territory, which means something stronger is forcing the animals into zones.
Once you're prepared, we'll break through the Mutant Bear's blockade together.

npcs.name: Quartermaster Rhea
dialogue: Rhea: The doctor sent you? Then you need supplies, not bravery.
Med Kits restore HP, Adrenal Serum boosts attack, Sprint Serum boosts speed, and Revive Shots bring a fallen ally back.
Buy what you can, then collect samples from wild mutants to unlock your first mutation.

npcs.name: Sample Herbalist
dialogue: Mutation samples are not junk. They are how your body learns to adapt.
Field Log 01: bat membranes and snake venom cluster near the colder cave-side paths. Boars and rabbits stay closer to the forest edge.
Field Log 02: the Alpha Chimera was not simply created in a tank. It assembled itself from unstable samples after the lab containment roots failed.
Open the Mutation Tree after you collect enough materials. Some upgrades require earlier mutations first.
Tall grass is dangerous, but it is also the safest place to gather samples before challenging the Mutant Bear.

npcs.name: Mutant Bear
dialogue: The Mutant Bear slams the ground and blocks the eastern trail.
It was once a normal forest bear. The outbreak changed it into a territorial monster guarding the road to the lab.
Its bones have overgrown into armor. If you defeat it, the plates may give Zac the material needed for Bone Plating.
Defeat it to open the only safe pass toward the containment gate.
npcs.block_message_before_quest: The Mutant Bear blocks the trail. Gather samples, unlock two mutations, and prepare supplies first.

npcs.name: Alpha Chimera
dialogue: The air twists around the Alpha Chimera. This is not just another mutant.
It is the living source of the unstable mutation energy spreading through the woods.
Every sample you stabilized was a fragment of its pattern. Now the forest is trying to pull those fragments back together.
If it breaks quarantine, the infection will reach the settlements beyond the island. End the outbreak here.
npcs.block_message_before_quest: Alpha Chimera guards the lab. Contain the Mutant Bear, then unlock 4 mutations and equip a non-basic skill before approaching.
